text:
Created attachment 157185
rubygem-ruby_parser.diff

- Version update from 3.2.2 to 3.6.6
- Add NO_ARCH=yes
- Add USES=shebangfix for bin/ruby_parse and bin/ruby_parse_extract_error

# portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.
